mapper.select: SELECT store_id, region_id, store_name, category, address, phone, business_hours, description, emoji, rating_avg, status, latitude, longitude FROM tb_store WHERE latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT coupon_id, store_id, coupon_name, benefit, condition_text, expire_date FROM tb_coupon WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 3

SELECT s.store_id, s.region_id, r.region_name, s.category_id, c.code AS category, c.name AS category_name, s.store_name, s.address, s.phone, s.business_hours, s.description, s.emoji, s.rating_avg, s.status, s.latitude, s.longitude, DATE_FORMAT(s.updated_at, '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') AS img_ver FROM tb_store s LEFT JOIN tb_region r ON s.region_id = r.region_id LEFT JOIN tb_category c ON s.category_id = c.category_id WHERE s.store_id = #{storeId} AND s.is_deleted = 0
